context: A boy shares a quiet affectionate moment with his golden retriever on a sunny lawn.

actions.description: The boy crouches beside Max and reaches toward the dog with a happy smile.
He strokes the retriever gently while Max lies in the grass and wags its tail.
The dog relaxes into the attention as flowers sway lightly in the background.
